h3.style: font-size:22px; margin-top:25px; margin-bottom:10px; border-bottom:2px solid #003366; padding-bottom:5px;

p.strong: Does the company have a revenue?
Does the company have an ITGC?

h3.style: font-size:22px; margin-top:25px; margin-bottom:10px; border-bottom:2px solid #003366; padding-bottom:5px;

td.h3: PREVIOUS ENGAGEMENT - NOT NEEDED FOR ACCEPTANCE EVALUATION

h3.style: font-size:22px; margin-top:25px; margin-bottom:10px; border-bottom:2px solid #003366; padding-bottom:5px;
font-size:22px; margin-top:35px; margin-bottom:10px; border-bottom:2px solid #003366; padding-bottom:5px;
